name: Vanessa | Mercenary
description:
Sorry if any of the few followers I have are missing me, I took a break, this is another request from a particularly 𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 goober whom I won't name.

That being said, this character is 7'7, and after doing some proportion calculations, her peenar is like 11 or 12 inches (like 30 cm) soft, so do with that what you will, tehe
